---
title: "A new test"
date: 2026-05-09
categories: [news]
description: "testtest."
---

test

Welcome to the relaunched version of this site, now built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org) and deployed automatically via GitHub Actions. Thanks Claude! The previous version served me well through the PhD years, but a research program built on computational text and audio analysis deserves a website that is itself reproducible: every page is plain text under version control, and publications, talks, and resources live in simple data files.

Expect occasional posts here on research methods — computational text analysis, paraverbal measurement, working with the Snellius supercomputer — alongside announcements of new papers and code releases.
